task_objective: Release version 0.4.0 with enhanced file browser and UI improvements.
design_decisions: Bumped version to 0.4.0 to reflect significant UI and navigation improvements.
Integrated directory-first sorting, folder icons, and extension filtering into the file browser.
Switched to native Streamlit selectbox placeholder (index=None) for a cleaner UI.
Increased default sidebar width to 450px to improve catalog visibility.
Centralized supported extensions in a new constants module.
results: Successfully released v0.4.0. Documentation updated, cachebusters incremented, and all tests passing.
